UW-12  JOINT EFFICIENCIES FOR ARC AND GAS WELDED JOINTS. (a) The maximum joint efficiency to be used in the design formulas of UG-27 shall be determined from Table UW-12 based on the joint type in accordance with UW-3 and the degree of examination as required by UW-11. (b) Fully radiographed Type 1 joints shall have E = 1.0. Spot-examined joints shall have E = 0.85, except as permitted by UW-52 for reduced examination. Joints not examined shall have E = 0.70. (c) For lethal service vessels, the requirements of UW-2 shall apply. The joint efficiency shall be used with the allowable stress in accordance with UG-23. See also UW-9 for joint design.
